title: Trump wants to squeeze Iran into peace talks with more troops — but it may backfire, analysts say
summary_full: Trump's threats to ramp up military presence may be to pressure Iran to negotiate but the battle may be harder than he calculated, say analysts.
summary_public: Trump's threats to ramp up military presence may be to pressure Iran to negotiate but the battle may be harder than he calculated, say analysts.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump wants to squeeze Iran into peace talks with more troops
